news.t: Pacer ETFs Expands Cash Cows ETF™ Series With the Addition of a New Growth Rotation Fund and a Quality-Focused Fund

holdings.infoBox: QQWZ is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.11%, Apple at 6.96%, Micron Technology at 4.96%, Microsoft at 4.72%, and Amazon.com at 4.17%.

overview.description: The Pacer Cash COWZ 100-Nasdaq 100 Rotator ETF (QQWZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cash COWZ 100-Nasdaq 100 Rotator index. The fund tracks an index that rotates between the Pacer US Cash Cows 100 Index and the Nasdaq-100 Index based on momentum. QQWZ was launched on May 6, 2025 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Expands Cash Cows ETF™ Series With the Addition of a New Growth Rotation Fund and a Quality-Focused Fund
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $LCOW #ETF--Pacer ETFs adds two new strategies to its Cash Cows Series with a sector rotation fund and quality-focused fund.
